questions.question: What was the primary method used to resolve the disputed election results in the 1876 presidential election?
options: C) The use of cryptographic techniques
D) The manual recount of ballots
questions.explanation: The electoral college system was used to resolve the disputed election results in the 1876 presidential election.

questions.question: Which of the following ciphers was used to encrypt and decrypt the disputed electoral votes?
questions.explanation: None of the ciphers listed were used in the 1876 presidential election.

questions.question: What was the name of the compromise agreement that ended the dispute over the election results?
questions.explanation: The Compromise of 1877 ended the dispute over the election results.

questions.question: Which of the following was NOT a factor that contributed to the disputed election results?
options: C) The use of the electoral college system
D) The rise of the Republican Party
questions.explanation: The rise of the Republican Party was not a factor that contributed to the disputed election results.

questions.question: What was the outcome of the dispute over the electoral votes from the state of Florida?
options: C) The votes were declared invalid
D) The votes were counted twice
questions.explanation: The electoral votes from the state of Florida were declared invalid in the dispute over the election results.
